<a id="kind-vbsinstance"></a>
## VbsInstance

Manage OCI Visual Builder Studio instances.

- `Plural`: `vbsinstances`
- `Scope`: `Namespaced`
- `APIVersion`: `vbsinst.oracle.com/v1beta1`
- `Sample`: [Sample](../../../samples/vbsinst/v1beta1/vbsinstance.md) (`config/samples/vbsinst_v1beta1_vbsinstance.yaml`)
- `Packages`: Not currently exposed by a customer-visible package.
